chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-709 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For orders on office objection No. 1, 2, 3 2. For hearing of CMA No. 3820/2025 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3821/2025 4. For hearing of main case 10-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Ishaq Ali Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Metlo Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh PI Zahid Qadri of P.S. Bahadurabad Barrister Syed Ali Muhammad Zaidi files power as well as statement on behalf of the Respondent No.7 which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the Respondent No.3/SBCA files comments which are also taken on record. This petition pertain to illegal / unsanctioned use of residential plot No.238, Block-3, Delhi Mercantile Cooperative Housing Society Karachi. The learned counsel for the respondents undertake, upon instructions, that the said residential property shall not be used / permitted to be used for any illegal / unsanctioned purpose and / or for any purpose contrary to the terms of its allotment / lease. It is jointly stated that it may be just and proper for the petition to be allowed in terms aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
